heading: Truths to live by
lead: Short, practical talks where Malvika turns her experience into tools you can use.

items.title: Truth 1 💥 I thought my story ended with the blast… but it didn't.
Truth 2 🌱 My scars don't show my weakness. They show my survival.
Truth 3 ✨ Losing pieces of life doesn't mean you're broken.
Truth 4 🌊 Your pace doesn't define your worth.
Truth 5 ☀️ The blast could have ended me — but I chose life.
Truth 6 🦋 My life isn't defined by what I lost — it's defined by what I've built since.
